raw_consumer_statement: On my card statement it shows I have purchased something for XXXX and I did try to purchase an XXXX cell phone but the purchase didnt go through online at bestbuy.com. A month later it shows up on my bill. On recent purchases nothing shows up that I received any item at all. There is no trace that I received this item. They removed it off of my card and opened an investigation. Early XXXX they reached a decision saying I made the purchase, I had to pay for the item I never received. I called back and made another claim telling them that I never received the item because it exceeded my available balance and the woman seen that nothing had been purchased and open another claim. Bestbuy customer service agents for the credit card company are saying they see an XXXX was delivered but it doesnt show on my recent transactions.
